threats.title: Librarian Account Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker impersonates a librarian account.

threats.title: Unauthorized Book Modification
threats.description: Book records are modified without proper authorization.

threats.title: Book Deletion Repudiation
threats.description: A librarian deletes book records but denies performing the action.

threats.title: Login Request Manipulation
threats.description: Login request parameters are modified to bypass authentication checks.

threats.title: Credential Exposure
threats.description: User credentials could be intercepted during transmission.

threats.title: Borrow Request Manipulation
threats.description: Borrow request parameters such as bookId are modified by attackers.

threats.title: Book Data Exposure
threats.description: Unauthorized users access the book database.

threats.title: Credential Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker impersonates a legitimate user using stolen or guessed credentials.
threats.mitigation: Strong passwords, password hashing, optional MFA.

threats.title: User Login Repudiation
threats.description: A user denies performing a login action due to lack of activity logging.

threats.title: Session Privilege Escalation
threats.description: Attackers manipulate session tokens to gain higher privileges.

threats.title: Brute Force Login Attack
threats.description: Attackers repeatedly attempt login requests to overwhelm authentication services.

threats.title: Member Identity Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker impersonates another member to borrow books.

threats.title: Borrow Activity Repudiation
threats.description: A member denies performing a borrowing transaction.

threats.title: Borrow Request Flooding
threats.description: Attackers send excessive borrow requests to overload the system.

threats.title: Borrow History Exposure
threats.description: Borrow history becomes accessible to unauthorized users.

threats.title: Admin Identity Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker impersonates an administrator account.

threats.title: Unauthorized Role Modification
threats.description: Attackers modify user roles to gain elevated privileges.

threats.title: Admin Action Repudiation
threats.description: An administrator denies making changes to user accounts.

threats.title: User Data Exposure
threats.description: Sensitive user information becomes accessible to unauthorized users.
